description: Style NoteLife through glasses has never looked more impressive. These fastrack sunglasses give you that trendy urban look. Accessorize with these and drive around town looking your fashionable best.Product DetailsLens colour: BlackFrame colour: Grey metal frameFrame type: Metal full frameHigh bridge and flexible nose pads made of rubber Material and CareRemove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth providedRemove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleanerDo not use your fingers on such stainsDo not place glasses on uneven surfaces or heated areas like the dashboard of a car Warranty: 1 Year
